name: oidc
description: Optional OpenID Connect sign-in with explicit external identity linking.

settings.label: Authorization URL
settings.description: HTTPS authorization endpoint supplied by the identity provider.

settings.label: Token URL
settings.description: HTTPS code-exchange endpoint supplied by the identity provider.

settings.label: User info URL
settings.description: HTTPS endpoint that returns the authenticated user's OIDC claims.

settings.label: Client secret
settings.description: OIDC client secret. Leave blank when saving to preserve the existing value.

settings.label: Scopes
settings.description: Space-separated scopes requested from the provider.

settings.label: Create new users
settings.description: Create a viewer account when an external identity is not linked yet.

settings.label: Provisioned role
settings.description: Existing local role assigned to newly provisioned external users.
